# OnPoint Pros Remodeling LLC
Bathroom remodeling company serving North DFW: Allen, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Richardson, Prosper (Texas, USA).
The bathroom-remodeling branch of OnPoint Pros (onpointprostx.com).

Services: tub-to-shower conversions ($10,000–$14,000 typical), custom walk-in tiled showers,
full bathroom remodels ($12,000–$22,000 typical). Written fixed pricing, free 30-minute in-home quote.
Real tile construction — not acrylic liner systems. Most bathrooms: ~2 weeks on-site.

Address: 1305 Spring St, Allen, TX 75002
Phone: (214) 888-8758 · Hours: Mon–Sun 7 AM–8 PM
Google rating: 5.0 stars (66 reviews, OnPoint Pros family profile)
